## Want to Contribute

You are absolutely welcome to! Thank you for contributing as this helps to ensure the project is being continuously improved on!


## Reporing Bugs

1. Don't open duplicate issues - Please search on the issue tracker whether someone else has already created a similar issue.
2. Include the ***complete** traceback. It is needed so that we can find the root of the problem.     

## Raising Pull Requests

It is recommended to first create an issue on what the PR is addressing. But if there isn't one, that's fine too.
- Explain what the PR does if there is no linked issue, else mention the issue at the bottom of your PR.
- Feel free to ping me or request me for a review if needed.
- Tick the checkboxes provided, if applicable.
